description_long: This stereo sound system consists of multiple black speaker units of varying sizes, including two large speakers mounted on tripods, several mid-sized rectangular speakers, and a couple of smaller box-shaped units. The arrangement suggests a professional audio setup, likely used for events or public gatherings in urban environments. The speakers have a matte black finish, and the larger units feature visible front grilles, likely made of perforated metal or mesh. The tripods are metallic and provide stable support for the elevated speakers. No visible control panels, display screens, or brand logos are apparent from the images. The overall design is utilitarian and robust, suitable for outdoor or indoor use.
description: A professional stereo sound system with multiple matte black speakers, including two on tripods and several box-shaped units, all with a robust, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing all speaker units, with two large speakers on tripods and several mid-sized and small box speakers arranged in a row.
description_view_1: Side view showing the depth of the speaker units and the profile of the tripods, with the speakers aligned in a straight line.
description_view_2: Rear angled view similar to the front, displaying the backs of the speakers and the structure of the tripods.
description_view_3: Opposite side view to view 1, again showing the depth and alignment of the speakers and tripods.
attribute_speaker_grille_pattern: Fine mesh or perforated metal grille with a uniform pattern, no decorative elements visible.
